description: platformAutomerge is intentionally false (not the base-template true): main requires the `ci-pass` status check, and GitHub-native platform automerge can fire in the brief window before that check registers. PR-level automerge (automerge:true, automergeType:pr) waits for the check, so it is the race-safe choice here. Do not flip platformAutomerge to true.

customManagers.description: Track Makefile tool versions via inline # renovate: comments
Track the deployed PostgreSQL workload image (the Go default in workloadImage() and the .env.example mirror) via inline renovate comments.

packageRules.description: Wait 3 days before automerging major updates
Group GitHub Actions into one PR
Group mise tool bumps and hold each for 3 days so the upstream GitHub Release artifacts the aqua/github-tags backend installs are published before the PR opens (prevents the tag-before-publish 404).
Bump the go directive in go.mod to the latest patch
Go toolchain is mirrored across go.mod, .mise.toml, and the Dockerfile builder — bump them together so a split PR can't leave them misaligned (also guarded by `make check-go-alignment`).
Group the Dapr Go SDK and durabletask-go — they are version-locked (the workflow authoring API lives in durabletask-go and is consumed via go-sdk).
Group the Kubernetes client libraries — k8s.io/api, /apimachinery, and /client-go (used by the real Kubernetes activity) are released in lockstep and must bump together.

Group the Dapr CLI (aqua:dapr/cli in .mise.toml — resolved packageName dapr/cli) and the Dapr runtime (DAPR_RUNTIME_VERSION in the Makefile, dapr/dapr) — the CLI installs the matching control-plane runtime for `make e2e`, so they should bump together. Matched by packageName because the mise manager's depName carries the aqua: prefix.

Disable digest pinning for every custom.regex-tracked docker ref: the Makefile's minlag/mermaid-cli dev tool AND the postgres workload image tracked in pkg/activities/config.go + .env.example. config:best-practices' docker:pinDigests generates a pinDigest update these customManagers cannot write back (their matchStrings capture only the tag, no currentDigest group), so the renovate/pin-dependencies branch errors on every run. Version pinning is sufficient here; the Dockerfile FROM pins (built-in dockerfile manager) keep their digests.
